title: iDeal runtime model
text: iDeal is a Windows desktop trading terminal. Most automation code runs inside ideal.exe using a C#-like embedded script host. WinForms components such as Form, Panel, Label, Button, Timer, and DataGridView can be created for custom dashboards.

title: Real account vs software position
text: ViopHesapOku and BistHesapOku read real broker account data. PozisyonKontrolOku and PozisyonKontrolGuncelle maintain the robot's own software-side position and cost tracking. They must not be treated as the same source.

title: Last price retrieval order
text: For live price, prefer YuzeyselVeriOku(symbol).LastPrice. If it is zero or invalid, fallback to SonFiyat(symbol). In some VIOP cases a UI grid or portfolio grid last-price column may be needed as a final source.

title: Entry price retrieval order
text: For robot entry cost, prefer PozisyonKontrolOku with out islemFiyat. If that is missing, use the robot grid entry cell as fallback. Do not overwrite robot entry cost with settlement price unless the use case explicitly wants settlement-based PnL.

title: Turkish number parsing risk
text: Turkish numeric formatting can cause x10, x100 or x10000 bugs when parsed naively. Mixed values such as 16.080,00 or 16080,0000 should be normalized by treating the last separator as decimal and forcing output formatting explicitly.

title: Symbol normalization
text: The same instrument may appear with prefixes and separators such as IMKBH'GARAN, VIP'VIP-X030-T, VIP-X030-T or X030T. Matching logic should uppercase, strip separators, and normalize common aliases before comparing.

title: Once-per-day execution windows
text: Robots that should run only in predefined windows can store timestamps with NesneKaydet and retrieve them with NesneGetir. This prevents multiple executions within the same day and time slot.

title: WinForms inspection and grid matching
text: Inside ideal.exe, Application.OpenForms can be scanned to find existing forms. DataGridView detection should rely on Name and HeaderText aliases rather than one exact string because Turkish captions and version differences are common.

title: External process limitation
text: State inside ideal.exe is not always reliably readable from PowerShell or another process. A safer pattern is to run a dump/export script inside iDeal and read the resulting text or CSV file externally.

title: Safe order flow
text: A common order flow is: read software position, read live price, check entry conditions, set EmirSembol/EmirIslem/EmirTipi/EmirMiktari/EmirFiyati, call EmirGonder, then update robot state with PozisyonKontrolGuncelle and log the result.
